name: Brunswick Stew#2 (with Chicken, Beef, & Pork)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh whole kernel corn (just cut off cob)
Optional: Tabasco or other red hot pepper sauce -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, beef, and pork in a large pot with cold water, salt, peppercorns, and dried red pepper.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 hours, or until meat is tender and falling off bones.
3. Remove and discard bones, gristle, and fat. Reserve the stock.
4. Cut the meat into cubes and return it to the stock.
5. Add all remaining ingredients.
6. Cover and cook slowly for several hours, checking occasionally during cooking time. If the stew is not thickening satisfactorily, remove the lid and let it simmer uncovered until desired consistency is reached.
Makes about 1 1/2 gallons.
